title: Balancer - Rekt II
relevance_summary: Rate manipulation through rounding errors in Balancer's scaling function

prevention.rule: Block any tx that shows unusual rounding behavior in critical scaling functions

red_flags: Subtle rounding error flagged in code comments
summary: A rounding error in Balancer's scaling function was exploited to drain over $128 million across multiple chains. A guard could have detected this by blocking transactions showing unusual rounding behavior in critical scaling functions.
